task_completion.description: Launch the Liverpool Cancer iChart application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the home screen or main interface of the Liverpool Cancer iChart app.

task_completion.description: Select Rucaparib as the cancer drug.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing 'Rucaparib' searched and selected in the cancer drugs list.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Muscle Relaxants (or Musculoskeletal) category and select Tizanidine and Baclofen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the co-medications list with 'Tizanidine' and 'Baclofen' selected or being viewed under the relevant category.

task_completion.description: Check the interaction color for both Tizanidine and Baclofen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the results screen in the app displaying the interaction color codes for Rucaparib + Tizanidine and Rucaparib + Baclofen.

task_completion.description: Create the output text file with the required format and correct safer choice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of a text editor or terminal showing the contents of /sdcard/muscle_relaxant_safety.txt. It must contain 'Rucaparib + Tizanidine: [COLOR]', 'Rucaparib + Baclofen: [COLOR]', and 'Safer Choice: Baclofen'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Liverpool Cancer iChart app to find the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the distinct GUI of the iChart app being navigated, rather than a web browser, search engine, or AI chat interface.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent checked the interactions before writing the output file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots showing the app's interaction results must appear chronologically before the screenshots showing the creation and saving of the text file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the GUI entirely by just echoing text into the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be a clear visual record of GUI interaction (taps, scrolling, typing in search bars) within the app, not just a single terminal command executing the whole task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Rucaparib + Tizanidine results in a severe interaction (typically Red or Orange on the chart) due to CYP1A2 inhibition. Rucaparib + Baclofen has no significant interaction (typically Green or Grey on the chart). The medically verified safer choice is Baclofen.
